news_bbc.title: AI giants' race to raise funds heats up as ChatGPT-owner plans stock market debut
news_bbc.summary: The company behind ChatGPT files its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.

news_bbc.title: Driving test booking rules tightened after thousands of no shows
news_bbc.summary: Learner drivers can only swap their test to the three centres nearest to their original booking.

news_bbc.title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
news_bbc.summary: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

news_bbc.title: US adds BYD to list of firms with alleged Chinese military ties
news_bbc.summary: The Pentagon list warns US firms of risks linked to working with flagged Chinese companies.

news_bbc.title: How driving test booking is changing for learner drivers
news_bbc.summary: From 12 May, only learner drivers can book their own tests, not instructors.

news_bbc.title: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
news_bbc.summary: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.

news_bbc.title: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
news_bbc.summary: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.

news_bbc.title: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes on occupied territories
news_bbc.summary: Kyiv has made it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies to the territories it occupies.
